title: Gold Surges on Record Inflows and Macro Tailwinds in 2025
author: tickeron_community
selftext: The precious metals complex is experiencing a surge unlike any we’ve seen since the last great market upheaval. Gold—long touted as the ultimate safe‑haven asset—has captured investor attention on multiple fronts. From record fund inflows to eye‑watering year‑to‑date gains, the setup for smart precious‑metal investors has never been more compelling.
